meta.title: MedSeg-TTA Leaderboard
meta.subtitle: A benchmark surface for paradigm, method, and modality-level medical TTA results across seven imaging modalities.
meta.mvpScope: Dataset tables include Dice, HD95, JI, Sensitivity, and PPV where reported in the paper.
sources: Table 4: Method-level benchmark summary across seven modalities
Tables 7-14: Modality-specific TTA performance with reported overlap and boundary metrics
